cultures.name: Aurora Stack
cultures.description: The orderly, sunlit colony on the bright face of Aurora Berg

cultures.name: Nightfall Shelf
cultures.description: The shadowed colony on the dark side of Aurora Berg

cultures.name: Orca Raiders
cultures.description: The fearsome orca predators of the deep waters

seedEntities.name: Aurora Berg
seedEntities.description: A towering, many-tiered iceberg whose shelves host rival super-penguin colonies.

seedEntities.name: Aurora Stack
seedEntities.description: A vertical colony carved into the sunlit face of Aurora Berg.

seedEntities.name: Nightfall Shelf
seedEntities.description: A shadowed ledge on the far side of Aurora Berg, lit by bioluminescent ice glyphs.

seedEntities.name: The Glow-Fissure
seedEntities.description: A deep crack in the ice under Nightfall Shelf that pulses with otherworldly light.

seedEntities.name: The Icebound Exchange
seedEntities.description: A merchant guild that monopolizes trade through Aurora Stack.

seedEntities.name: The Midnight Claws
seedEntities.description: A clandestine syndicate ruling Nightfall Shelf from the shadows.

seedEntities.name: High-Beak Auditor Selka
seedEntities.description: The meticulous mayor of Aurora Stack.

seedEntities.name: Shadow-Broker Nyla
seedEntities.description: The unofficial mayor of Nightfall Shelf.

eras.name: The Great Thaw
eras.description: A period of exploration and colony founding as the ice recedes

eras.name: The Faction Wars
eras.description: Resource scarcity leads to inter-colony conflicts

eras.name: The Clever Ice Age
eras.description: Technology and magic flourish as penguins seek solutions

eras.name: The Orca Incursion
eras.description: External threats unite the colonies against common enemies

eras.name: The Frozen Peace
eras.description: Rebuilding and consolidation after the wars

pressures.name: Territorial Ambition
pressures.description: Drive for factions to claim and expand territory - rises with faction density

pressures.name: Trade Wealth
pressures.description: Economic prosperity - based on merchant to outlaw ratio

pressures.name: Orca Menace
pressures.description: The looming threat - rises with orca population

pressures.name: Mystical Stirring
pressures.description: Strange energies - rises with anomaly and cult density

generationRules.name: Trade Outpost Established
generationRules.description: A faction establishes a new trade outpost near a thriving colony. Uses proximity_decay to place near active trade routes.

create.descriptionTemplate: A trading outpost built to extend commercial reach across the ice.
The enterprising penguin who founded this outpost.

generationRules.name: Faction Splinters
generationRules.description: Internal conflict causes a faction to split. Uses hub_penalty to avoid already-fragmented factions and status_gate to prefer troubled ones.

create.descriptionTemplate: A breakaway faction formed by dissenters from {parent_faction.name}.
The ambitious leader who split from {parent_faction.name} to forge a new destiny.

occurrence.descriptionTemplate: {rebel_leader.name} led a schism from {parent_faction.name}, founding {splinter.name} amid bitter acrimony.

generationRules.name: Criminal Syndicate Emerges
generationRules.description: Wealth inequality spawns organized crime near prosperous locations. Uses proximity_decay to place near wealthy areas.

create.descriptionTemplate: A shadowy syndicate that preys on the wealth flowing through {wealthy_location.name}.
The ruthless mastermind who built a criminal empire in the shadows.

occurrence.descriptionTemplate: {crime_boss.name} founded {syndicate.name} near {wealthy_location.name}, casting a shadow over the berg's prosperity.

generationRules.name: Cult Receives Revelation
generationRules.description: Mystical energies near an anomaly inspire cult founding. Uses proximity_decay to spawn near anomalies.

create.descriptionTemplate: A cult devoted to the strange emanations of {holy_site.name}.
A prophet who claims to have witnessed visions in {holy_site.name}'s light.

occurrence.descriptionTemplate: {prophet.name} emerged from {holy_site.name} claiming divine revelation, founding {cult.name}.

generationRules.name: Strange Anomaly Discovered
generationRules.description: Explorers discover a mysterious location. Uses proximity_decay to place near existing settlements.

create.descriptionTemplate: A place where the ice behaves strangely, discovered near {nearest_colony.name}.

occurrence.descriptionTemplate: {anomaly.name} was discovered near {nearest_colony.name} - a place of mystery and danger.

generationRules.name: Orca Warlord Arrives
generationRules.description: A legendary orca hunter arrives where defenses are weakest. Uses hub_penalty to avoid well-defended areas.

create.descriptionTemplate: A massive orca whose name strikes terror across Aurora Berg, lurking near {target_colony.name}.

occurrence.descriptionTemplate: {warlord.name} surfaced in the waters near {target_colony.name}, and the colonies trembled.

simulationRules.name: Faction War Erupts
simulationRules.description: Territorial tensions boil over into open warfare between factions. Uses faction_modifier to prefer enemy factions and proximity_decay to prefer nearby targets.

occurrence.descriptionTemplate: {aggressor.name} declared war on {target.name}, plunging the berg into conflict.

simulationRules.name: Territory Seized
simulationRules.description: A faction at war conquers a location. Uses proximity_decay to prefer nearby locations and tag_filter to prefer valuable targets.

occurrence.descriptionTemplate: {conqueror.name} seized control of {territory.name} in a decisive victory.

simulationRules.name: Alliance Against Common Threat
simulationRules.description: Factions put aside differences to face the orca menace. Uses culture_affinity to prefer same-culture alliances and proximity_decay for nearby factions.

occurrence.descriptionTemplate: {faction1.name} and {faction2.name} forged an alliance against the orca threat.

simulationRules.name: Orca Raid on Colony
simulationRules.description: Orcas attack a colony, causing devastation and creating a hero. Uses proximity_decay to prefer nearby colonies.

create.descriptionTemplate: A hero who rose to defend the colony during the orca raids.

occurrence.descriptionTemplate: {raider.name} led a devastating raid on {target_colony.name}. {defender.name} emerged as a hero in the defense.

simulationRules.name: Faction Leadership Coup
simulationRules.description: An ambitious NPC seizes control of a faction. Uses status_gate to prefer waning factions and hub_penalty to avoid well-connected ones.

create.descriptionTemplate: A cunning schemer who seized power through treachery.

occurrence.descriptionTemplate: {usurper.name} seized control of {target_faction.name} in a bloody coup.

simulationRules.name: Mystical Event at Anomaly
simulationRules.description: Strange occurrences at an anomaly draw attention. Uses prominence_evolution to boost the anomaly's fame.

occurrence.descriptionTemplate: Strange lights and sounds erupted from {site.name}, drawing pilgrims and fearmongers alike.

simulationRules.name: Fear of Orcas Spreads
simulationRules.description: After orca raids, fear spreads through the population via relationships. Uses contagion_spread module to simulate epidemic-like tag propagation.

occurrence.descriptionTemplate: Fear of the orcas spreads through the colonies like a contagion.

simulationRules.name: Prominence Shifts
simulationRules.description: Well-connected entities rise in prominence while isolated ones fade. Uses prominence_evolution module.

occurrence.descriptionTemplate: The tides of fame shift across Aurora Berg - some rise while others fade from memory.

simulationRules.name: Old Bonds Weaken
simulationRules.description: Relationships that aren't reinforced gradually decay over time. Uses relationship_decay module.

simulationRules.name: Cult Recruits Members
simulationRules.description: Cults recruit nearby NPCs, especially those who are fearful or mystically inclined. Uses culture_affinity and tag_filter modules for intelligent selection.

occurrence.descriptionTemplate: {recruit.name} was drawn into {cult.name}, seduced by promises of power and protection.

simulationRules.name: Trade Partnership Forms
simulationRules.description: Merchants from different cultures form trade partnerships. Uses culture_affinity in 'avoid' mode to prefer cross-cultural trade.

occurrence.descriptionTemplate: {merchant1.name} and {merchant2.name} established a lucrative trade partnership across cultures.

feedbackLoops.description: Territorial ambition leads to faction wars and territory seizure
Wealth attracts criminal enterprises that undermine prosperity
Orca raids create heroes who become faction leaders
Mystical events spawn cults that seek to control anomalies
